items.title: Does UnitedHealth Stock Have More Upside After Q3 Earnings?
items.description: UnitedHealth Group's (UNH) stock hasn't received the post-earnings rally that investors may have hoped for, but the medical giant was able to provide subtle signs that its operations are stabilizing.

items.title: UnitedHealth (UNH): Net Margin Rises to 4%, Reinforcing Growth Quality Narrative Despite Valuation Debate
items.description: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) reported net profit margins of 4%, rising from 3.6% in the prior year, as EPS growth accelerated to 22.9% over the past year compared to a 2.6% annual average over five years. Looking ahead, analysts expect earnings to grow at 9.3% per year, while revenue is projected to climb 4.4% annually, both trailing the broader US market averages. With these results highlighting strong profitability and a favorable valuation, investors may focus on the balance of rewards and...

items.title: UnitedHealth: Risk-Reward Profile Signals Time To Hold, Not Buy (Rating Downgrade)
items.description: Read here for latest on UnitedHealth (UNH) stock's Q3 earnings beat, strategic shifts, and future outlook. Check if now is the right time to invest.

items.title: Earnings live: Meta stock tumbles, Microsoft slides, and Alphabet rises as Big Tech earnings pour in
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: Cigna Reports Earnings Thursday. The Stock Is Facing Political Uncertainties.
items.description: Cigna has outperformed peers as the managed-care industry faces policy challenges. Affordable Care Act subsidies are set to expire and premiums for next year are up 26%.
